text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle for first place, Oguri Cap
clinches the victory at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the battle to determine who's strongest has
only just begun. Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross
vow to meet again in the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle for first place, Tamamo Cross
clinches the victory in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the battle to determine who's strongest has
only just begun. Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross
vow to meet again in the autumn Tenno Sho.
